headline: Costco Recall And Lawsuit Test Food Safety Controls And Investor Confidence
summary: Costco Wholesale (NasdaqGS:COST) has issued a recall of Lactantia UltraPur Milk due to a food safety risk. The company is also seeking dismissal of a lawsuit that challenges advertising claims related to its rotisserie chicken. Both developments focus attention on Costco's product quality controls, consumer protections, and marketing practices. For a warehouse club retailer like Costco, where members often buy food in bulk, any recall tied to a food safety issue goes straight to the heart...
